description.value:
A single-edged curved blade weighted toward the tip for devastating cleaving strikes. Favored by warriors who rely on raw power to overwhelm their opponents.

Training

LevelProperties
UntrainedTwo-Handed, Melee d8, Slashing
BasicTwo-Handed, Melee d10, Disarm, Punch
MasterTwo-Handed, Melee d10, Disarm, Punch â€” all bonuses apply
Master PerkYour powerful blows count as critical hits for the purpose of triggering on-crit effects and resistances.

rmeData.masterPerk: Your powerful blows count as critical hits for the purpose of triggering on-crit effects and resistances.
